name: Poll
description: Allows your site to capture votes on different topics in the form of multiple choice questions.
notes: Formerly Drupal core's Poll module, now maintained as contrib. The documented release 2.0.0-alpha5 is an ALPHA (pre-stable) — API/schema may still change. Defines two content entity types: `poll` (a question with settings) and `poll_choice` (an answer option, referenced by the poll's unlimited-cardinality `choice` field). Votes are NOT entities; they are stored in the `poll_vote` table via the `poll_vote.storage` service. Ships one block plugin, `poll_recent_block` ("Most recent poll"). No config schema and no Drush commands of its own.
